info.name: Microsoft Azure FeatureClient
info.description: Azure Feature Exposure Control (AFEC) provides a mechanism for the resource providers to control feature exposure to users. Resource providers typically use this mechanism to provide public/private preview for new features prior to making them generally available. Users need to explicitly register for AFEC features to get access to such functionality.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Features Operations

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

request.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Features REST API operations.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Features Features

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the target subscription.

request.description: Gets all the preview features that are available through AFEC for the subscription.

response.name: OK - Returns an array containing metadata for each feature. The metadata includes the name of the feature, the registration state, the resource ID, and resource type.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Features Providers Resourceprovidernamespace Features Featurename Register

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the target subscription.
(Required) The namespace of the resource provider.
(Required) The name of the feature to register.

request.description: Registers the preview feature for the subscription.

response.name: OK - Returns metadata about the registered feature. The metadata includes the name of the feature, the registration state, the resource ID, and resource type.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Features Providers Resourceprovidernamespace Features Featurename Unregister

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the target subscription.
(Required) The namespace of the resource provider.
(Required) The name of the feature to unregister.

request.description: Unregisters the preview feature for the subscription.

response.name: OK - Returns metadata about the unregistered feature. The metadata includes the name of the feature, the registration state, the resource ID, and resource type.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Features Providers Resourceprovidernamespace Features Featurename

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the target subscription.
(Required) The resource provider namespace for the feature.
(Required) The name of the feature to get.

request.description: Gets the preview feature with the specified name.

response.name: OK - Returns metadata about the feature. The metadata includes the name of the feature, the registration state, the resource ID, and resource type.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Features Providers Resourceprovidernamespace Features

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.

variable.description: (Required) The ID of the target subscription.
(Required) The namespace of the resource provider for getting features.

request.description: Gets all the preview features in a provider namespace that are available through AFEC for the subscription.

response.name: OK - Returns an array containing metadata for each feature in the resource provider. The metadata includes the name of the feature, the registration state, the resource ID, and resource type.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation.
